name: VERA Paper A claim ledger audit

checks.requirement: A machine-readable claim ledger must exist.
A human-readable claim ledger must exist.
Every allowed claim must point to existing evidence artifacts.
checks.next_step: Add evidence paths for every allowed claim or remove unsupported claims.

checks.requirement: The ledger must register the most dangerous unsupported claims.
checks.next_step: Add missing forbidden claims and exact manuscript patterns.

checks.requirement: The claim audit must scan the submission-facing manuscript files.
checks.next_step: Add or repair audited manuscript paths in the claim ledger.

checks.requirement: Submission-facing manuscript files must not assert unsupported claims.
checks.next_step: Remove or reframe the forbidden claims from the manuscript files.
